docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY RAIA, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT ADUNNI, MALIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAIA, NICHOLAS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS RAIA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MALIK ADUNNI IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
